nasb.text: He walked in the way of his father Asa and did not depart from it, doing right in the sight of the Lord.

esv.text: He walked in the way of Asa his father and did not turn aside from it, doing what was right in the sight of the Lord.

cnv.text: 約沙法遵行他父親亞撒的道路，總不偏離，行耶和華看為正的事。

ccb.text: 约沙法效法他父亲亚撒，做耶和华视为正的事，不偏不离。
